channel.title: Comments for page "Autonomy, Part IV"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Autonomy, Part IV"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"traits which are specified in 'Directive C-42' provided to you directly from High Command, last I knew. But I'm losing myself; you say there's a problem? Do you need a new iteration?"

Is that meant to be A-42, or was that intentional?

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded: This will probably be like 15 parts long, because as you can see this part is some sort of exposition/rising action hybrid, but I'm following an outline so ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
